stemHtml: A pilot is flying under the IFR rules in VMC conditions when you experience communication failure. What actions should the pilot take?

options.a: Squawk 7700 and continue in accordance with the flight plan.
options.b: Continue in VMC to the destination aerodrome and land within 30 min after the estimated time of arrival in the flight plan.
options.c: Continue in VMC, land at the nearest suitable aerodrome and report your arrival to the appropriate air traffic control unit.
options.d: Continue to the destination aerodrome, adding 500 ft to all the altitudes in the flight plan.
